suggestions.title: Scope custom metric alert query to the Function App
suggestions.recommendation: Include cloud_RoleName filter in player_count_returned query to avoid cross-app false positives.

suggestions.title: Improve post-deploy alert verification observability
suggestions.recommendation: Expose alert and action group resource IDs in main outputs to simplify deployment verification in Azure Portal/CLI.

suggestions.title: Avoid duplicated time-window filtering in KQL and alert windowSize
suggestions.recommendation: Remove explicit timestamp >= ago(1h) filters and rely on windowSize for consistent alert evaluation windows.

suggestions.title: Confirm operational mailbox for Action Group destination
suggestions.recommendation: Verify the parameter value is the intended monitored inbox for rciapala in target environments before deployment.
